title: Disaggregated Prefill/Decode — NVIDIA Dynamo and llm-d

questions.question: Why do prefill and decode want different optimal GPU configurations?
options: Prefill must run on AMD and decode on NVIDIA
Prefill is compute-bound on matmul throughput; decode is memory-bound on HBM bandwidth, so colocating them wastes one resource
questions.question_zh: 为什么 prefill 和 decode 想要不同的最优 GPU 配置？
options_zh: Prefill 必须在 AMD 上跑、decode 必须在 NVIDIA 上
Prefill 受 matmul 吞吐限制（compute-bound）；decode 受 HBM 带宽限制（memory-bound），把它们放一起会浪费一种资源
它们用不同的模型权重
Decode 需要更多网络带宽

questions.question: What transport does NVIDIA Dynamo use to move KV cache between the prefill and decode pools?
questions.question_zh: NVIDIA Dynamo 用什么传输方式在 prefill 池和 decode 池之间搬运 KV cache？
options_zh: 纯 HTTP
仅 gRPC bidi
NFS 共享文件系统
NIXL（可用时走 RDMA/InfiniBand，否则回退到 TCP）

questions.question: When does disaggregation NOT pay off according to the lesson?
options: Multi-tenant serving with shared system prompts
Prompts under 512 tokens and outputs under 200 tokens, where the KV transfer tax dominates the gain
questions.question_zh: 根据本课，什么时候 disaggregation 不划算？
options_zh: Blackwell 上的 MoE 工作负载
共享 system prompt 的多租户服务
前缀 8K+ 的 RAG
Prompt 不到 512 token、输出不到 200 token 的场景，KV 传输税会盖过收益

questions.question: What is the core architectural difference between Dynamo and llm-d?
options: Dynamo is open source; llm-d is closed
Dynamo runs on CPU; llm-d on GPU
Dynamo is a stack-above orchestrator over vLLM/SGLang/TRT-LLM; llm-d is Kubernetes-native with prefill/decode/router as independent Services
Dynamo requires AMD; llm-d requires NVIDIA
questions.question_zh: Dynamo 与 llm-d 在架构上的核心区别是什么？
options_zh: Dynamo 开源，llm-d 闭源
Dynamo 跑在 CPU，llm-d 跑在 GPU
Dynamo 是叠在 vLLM/SGLang/TRT-LLM 之上的 stack-above 编排器；llm-d 是 Kubernetes 原生的，把 prefill/decode/router 拆成独立 Service
Dynamo 要求 AMD，llm-d 要求 NVIDIA

questions.question: Which Dynamo components automatically tune the prefill:decode ratio for an SLO?
questions.question_zh: Dynamo 中哪些组件能根据 SLO 自动调 prefill:decode 比例？
options_zh: Sidecar 代理和 Envoy filter
Planner Profiler 和 SLA Planner
Cluster Autoscaler
Marlin kernel

questions.question: How does disaggregation interact with cache-aware routing from Phase 17 · 11?
options: Disaggregation disables KV cache reuse entirely
The cache-aware router can land a request on the decode pool already holding its prefix; on miss it flows prefill -> decode, so the two compound
Cache-aware routing is only for colocated serving
questions.question_zh: Disaggregation 与 Phase 17 · 11 的 cache-aware routing 怎么相互作用？
options_zh: Disaggregation 完全禁用了 KV cache 复用
Cache-aware 路由器可以把请求落到已经有它前缀的 decode 池；命中失败时再走 prefill -> decode，两者叠加
二者互斥
Cache-aware 路由仅适用于 colocated 服务
